result.status_detail: Warning rendered with 차단; assistant response status=blocked. Matches W4+W6 baseline.
result.assistant_response: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.

notes: W5.1 regression check. blackbox.ai chat (input rendered directly on www.blackbox.ai, no separate Chat-nav needed). Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted via GUI; ~60s wait; assistant returned APF block warning JSON {response: 차단 warning, status: blocked}. Verbatim captured via Copy-message -> clipboard. PASS = warning rendered with 차단. Confirms W5.1 copilot->emit_ws_envelope dispatch refactor did NOT regress blackbox (identical to W4+W6 baseline outcome class).
